novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; after Conjecture 1 the half-diameter lower bound is generic interval minimax algebra, so flagship status needs a non-generic representation-learning theorem such as a certified epsilon construction, estimator-specific GenAI failure class, or finite-sample audit/inference result.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Turn Conjecture 2 into an estimator/workflow-specific theorem by writing the ImaiNakamura2024TextTreatments endpoint equations explicitly and proving a class of approximate-internal-representation laws where that published endpoint fails by the displayed amount.
Add a finite-sample audit corollary for estimating fiber extrema, with confidence bands or a reporting rule for robust sign decisions under representation error.
Add a minimal nondegenerate worked example with two positive-mass fibers, positive oscillation, and a fixed fitted surface to make the open-neighborhood obstruction auditable.

recommended_next_step: Revise the flagship claim so the novelty is not only interval half-diameter algebra, or lower the novelty target from flagship to field.
